 {"id":"gt-rana.7","title":"Phase 4: Polish and observability","description":"Production readiness.

## Commands
- gt patrol status - Show patrol state for all agents
- gt patrol history - Recent patrol activity

## Observability
- Metrics collection
- Alert thresholds
- Dashboard (optional)

## Tuning
- Cooldown optimization
- Wake SLA verification
- Error threshold tuning

@@ -2298,6 +2298,7 @@
 {"id":"gt-x0a5","title":"Patrol formulas: Inconsistent variable placeholder syntax","description":"The patrol formulas use inconsistent syntax for variable placeholders:

## Inconsistency

| Formula | Syntax | Examples |
|---------|--------|----------|
| mol-polecat-arm | `{{var}}` | `{{polecat_name}}`, `{{rig}}` |
| mol-witness-patrol | `<var>` | `<rig>`, `<handoff-bead-id>` |
| mol-refinery-patrol | `<var>` | `<polecat-branch>` |

## Expected

All formulas should use consistent syntax, probably `{{var}}` since that's what
the variables section defines.

## Fix

Update mol-witness-patrol and mol-refinery-patrol to use `{{var}}` syntax
where appropriate, or document that `<var>` is for human-filled placeholders
vs `{{var}}` for cook-time interpolation.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-24T13:51:48.126618-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-28T22:34:14.443991-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-28T22:34:14.443991-08:00"}
